nasb.text: He who walks righteously and speaks with sincerity, He who rejects unjust gain And shakes his hands so that they hold no bribe; He who stops his ears from hearing about bloodshed And shuts his eyes from looking upon evil;

esv.text: He who walks righteously and speaks uprightly, who despises the gain of oppressions, who shakes his hands, lest they hold a bribe, who stops his ears from hearing of bloodshed and shuts his eyes from looking on evil,

cnv.text: 那行事公義，說話正直， 拒絕不義的財利， 搖手不受賄賂， 塞耳不聽血腥的事， 閉眼不看邪惡的事的，

ccb.text: 秉公行义、说话正直、 憎恶不义之财、不受贿赂、 掩耳不听害人之谋、 闭眼不看邪恶之事的人，

csbs.text: 那行事公义、说话正直、 厌弃压榨所得的利益、摇手不受贿赂、 掩耳不听杀人流血之计、 闭眼不看邪恶之事的，
